Protein names: Bifunctional homocysteine S-methyltransferase/5,10-methylenetetrahydrofolate reductase [Includes: Homocysteine S-methyltransferase (EC 2.1.1.10) (S-methylmethionine:homocysteine methyltransferase); 5,10-methylenetetrahydrofolate reductase (EC 1.5.1.20)]
Sequence similarities: SIMILARITY: In the C-terminal section; belongs to the methylenetetrahydrofolate reductase family. {ECO:0000305}.
Catalytic activity: CATALYTIC ACTIVITY: Reaction=S-methyl-L-methionine + L-homocysteine = 2 L-methionine + H(+); Xref=Rhea:RHEA:26337, ChEBI:CHEBI:15378, ChEBI:CHEBI:57844, ChEBI:CHEBI:58199, ChEBI:CHEBI:58252; EC=2.1.1.10; CATALYTIC ACTIVITY: Reaction=(6S)-5-methyl-5,6,7,8-tetrahydrofolate + NADP(+) = (6R)-5,10-methylene-5,6,7,8-tetrahydrofolate + NADPH + H(+); Xref=Rhea:RHEA:19817, ChEBI:CHEBI:15378, ChEBI:CHEBI:15636, ChEBI:CHEBI:18608, ChEBI:CHEBI:57783, ChEBI:CHEBI:58349; EC=1.5.1.20; CATALYTIC ACTIVITY: Reaction=(6S)-5-methyl-5,6,7,8-tetrahydrofolate + NAD(+) = (6R)-5,10-methylene-5,6,7,8-tetrahydrofolate + NADH + H(+); Xref=Rhea:RHEA:19821, ChEBI:CHEBI:15378, ChEBI:CHEBI:15636, ChEBI:CHEBI:18608, ChEBI:CHEBI:57540, ChEBI:CHEBI:57945; EC=1.5.1.20;
